qualification_details: Role-based access controls for production data stores were not consistently enforced. 3 of 18 production databases had overly permissive IAM policies granting read access to all engineering roles rather than scoped to specific project teams. Databricks management response: remediation underway with expected completion Q4 2025.
cuecs_identified: 1. Customer responsible for managing and rotating encryption keys for data at rest using customer-managed keys (CMK) with rotation no less than annually.
cuec_validation_status: Pending -- infrastructure team has not confirmed CMK rotation configuration.
follow_up_actions: Escalated to CISO on Aug 15 2025. CISO acknowledged: 'Databricks has committed to remediating by Q4 2025. Will follow up.' Formal risk assessment required per Section 4.3 within 30 days of review (deadline: Sep 11 2025).
follow_up_status: No formal risk assessment documented. Awaiting Databricks remediation confirmation.
